architecture_notes_for_agents: Middleware runs on Edge runtime — provider-constant.ts is the ONLY safe import for middleware.
getActiveProvider() has a 5s cache TTL. Tests switching provider must wait >5s before asserting.
next-auth requires trustHost: true behind Traefik — do not remove.
Clerk clerkMiddleware() MUST run on all requests even when Authentik is active — Clerk is permanent.
Coolify SaaS app UUID: tuk1rcjj16vlk33jrbx3c9d3. MCP server UUID: a1fr37jiwehxbfqp90k4cvsw.

in_progress.title: [OPERATOR — THIS CYCLE] Fix /api/admin/set-provider — missing endpoint
in_progress.manager_instruction: This is now your top priority. Create /api/admin/set-provider as a route handler (or alias to /api/admin/auth-provider). It must: (1) accept POST with body {provider: 'clerk'|'authentik'}, (2) be protected by ADMIN_API_SECRET bearer token in Authorization header, (3) call setActiveProvider() to update app_config, (4) return 200 on success. If /api/admin/auth-provider already does this, you may instead update e2e/t001-auth.spec.ts to call the correct path — but confirm the existing endpoint's exact path and auth mechanism first. Log your approach and the resulting route path in BUILD_LOG.md. This must ship before observer-qa.yml can pass, regardless of when owner adds secrets.

in_progress.title: [VERIFY] Authentik sign-in flow end-to-end
in_progress.manager_instruction: Continue headless battery. Log new timestamped entry in QA_REPORT.md. This is Cycle 7 — dual blocker. Carry forward all confirmed passing checks. Note any new signals. Do NOT declare T-001 PASS without Tests A–D confirmed via observer-qa.yml.
